title: Famine
description: Minecraft mod that encourages exploration of better food alternatives from mods like farmer's delight, by increasing the exhaustion rate.
body:
# Famine Mod

This is a hardcore mod that I put together for my modpack in order to enforce progression and encourage collaboration in a multiplayer experience. The mod is meant to be combined with mods such as Create and Farmer's delight.

### Mod Features
- Increased Player Exhaustion => Food runs out quicker
- Enforced Gamerule Natural Regeneration false
- New Item Bandage as early game health restoration
- Skeletons shoot every 15 ticks regardless of difficulty
- Nether portals are disabled => New items "Hell Gem" to travel to the nether and a "Recall potion" to exit both can be found in ancient city chests to encourage exploration.
- Decreased food saturation multiplier and foodlevel by half => Ex: Cooked Beef is equivalent of eating an apple
- Eating raw meat causes Nausea, Poison and Hunger effects
